name: to-do
description: Date-routed daily to-do notes feeding SpaceDailyDashboard's tasks panel under spice/to-do/. v0.1.2: filename pattern <Name>-YYYY-MM-DD (filename_prefix "ToDo-") per v0.4.2 platform invariant. v0.2.0 MINOR (v0.58.0 FA-6): canonical-vocab adoption per Frontmatter Alignment. Template now emits type: "to-do" + canonical created_at: (ISO+TZ; replaces legacy created:). Discriminator tag todo stripped; temporal YYYY/MM/DD tag stripped. NEW canonical-vocab rule_fragment. v0.3.0 MINOR (v0.63.0): All-To-Dos aggregator at spice/to-do/All-ToDos.md (live Dataview, uncompleted tasks from prior days grouped by source date, excludes today); Migrate-to-tomorrow dialog (modal task picker; selected tasks + indented children moved from today to tomorrow's note, creating tomorrow from template if absent). v0.3.1 PATCH (v0.63.1): (1) fix customJS singleton-instance bug — todo-migrate-init.js used `new customJS.ToDoMigrateModal()` but customjs auto-instantiates; corrected to `customJS.ToDoMigrateModal.open()`. (2) scope re-balance — All-To-Dos + Migrate buttons removed from global nav_buttons[] (where they appeared on every note via SpaceNavButtons) and moved to NEW ToDoLeafActions CustomJS class that renders them as AccentButtons inline under the nav row in Today To-Do.md only. Mirrors ScratchLeafActions pattern. Rule-fragment scope tightened from spice/to-do/**/*.md to spice/to-do/**/ToDo-*.md so the new All-ToDos.md hub isn't validated against the daily-note naming pattern. v0.3.2 PATCH (v0.63.2): three UX/recovery fixes — (a) _renderTomorrowTemplate now embeds the ToDoLeafActions dataviewjs block so auto-created tomorrow notes match Templater-created ones; (b) ToDoMigrateModal._submit opens tomorrow note in workspace after successful migration so user immediately sees the result; (c) ToDoLeafActions.openAllToDos detects missing/empty hub file and re-writes canonical body before opening (recovery from user-deleted hub, since installer treats {{module_directory}} destinations as idempotent and never re-materializes). v0.3.3 PATCH (v0.63.3): minimal-template redesign — Today To-Do.md template strips ## Tasks heading, ## Notes heading, and the pre-existing - [ ] placeholder. _renderTomorrowTemplate matches. parseTasks gains frontmatter-aware fallback so free-form tasks added under the dataviewjs blocks (no ## Tasks heading required) get parsed. applyMigration gains end-of-file append path: when tomorrow has no ## Tasks heading, migrated content is appended at the end of the file with a blank-line separator (rather than the prior return-tomorrow-unchanged silent fail). Fixes the v0.63.2 smoke discovery where the - [ ] placeholder in tomorrow visually obscured the migrated task right below it. v0.63.3 ALSO corrects the post_install Notice text from v0.3.1 → v0.3.3 (FLN-todo-17).

post_install.message: To-do blueprint v0.3.3 installed at spice/to-do/. Daily note: click 'To Do' nav-button to create today's file. Inside the daily note, two inline AccentButtons appear: 'All To-Dos' (opens spice/to-do/All-ToDos.md — backlog of uncompleted tasks from prior days) and 'Migrate' (opens a dialog to move unchecked tasks to tomorrow). Buttons only render on daily to-do notes; not visible elsewhere.
